name: flow-capture
title: FlowCapture
description: Capture tasks quickly to Linear with AI assistance
author: dennis

commands.name: index
commands.title: FlowCapture
commands.subtitle: AI Quick Capture
commands.description: Capture clipboard noise into a structured Linear task using AI

preferences.name: llmApiKey
preferences.title: LLM API Key
preferences.description: OpenAI compatible API Key for intelligent processing

preferences.name: defaultAssignee
preferences.title: Default Assignee ID
preferences.description: The default user ID or email to assign captured tasks (Optional)

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the "prepublishOnly" script and rerun "npm publish" again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use "npm run publish" instead.

" && exit 1
